pages.full_text: Pershore Abbey. The bell-ringing platform showing the access via the spiral staircase.
photo_captions: Pershore Abbey. The bell-ringing platform showing the access via the spiral staircase.
pages.notes: Page is dominated by a large glued-in photograph of the interior of Pershore Abbey looking upward at the bell-ringing platform. Caption is handwritten alongside the photo on the right side. Partial numbers visible at far right edge are the overlap from the facing index page.

pages.notes: This is an index page mapping diary page numbers to places visited. Some entries are unclear: entry 29 reads something like 'Devrges, Bochangt' — very unclear. Entry 11 has a letter after 'Mannheim' that could be 'F'. Entry 20 has 'Vogognia, Mta Amena' — 'Mta' may be abbreviation for 'Mta' (mountain). Entry 23 reads '[?Miage] Glaciers' — possibly 'Miage Glacier' near Mont Blanc. Entry 38 '[?Balfon] (Forge)' — possibly 'Balfon' is a place in Burgundy. Entry 39 '[?Brgny]' likely abbreviation for Burgundy. Entry 41 '[?Bourget] [?Commin]' unclear. Entry 52 '[?Witdos]' unreadable. Entry 54 '[?Haies] de [?Nibblots], [?Chervieux]' unclear French place names. Entry 31 second place could be 'Austell' or 'Auster'. Note: page numbers 16, 17, 30, 34, 44 are absent from the list.
